title: cranichis cylindrostachys
intro: Cranichis cylindrostachys, also known as the cylindrical orchid or greenhood orchid, is a species of orchid that belongs to the Cranichidinae subfamily. This plant is used in traditional medicine for its potential medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Cranichis cylindrostachys include treating various conditions such as fever, cough, and skin infections, as well as being used as a tonic to boost overall health. In herbal preparations, the plant is typically dried and made into a tea or used in infusions to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
